# BP-25 positive: helper returns error instead of failing directly
lang: go
file: BP-25-vulnerable_test.go
variant: stdlib
---
package sample

import "testing"

func helper(t *testing.T) error {
	t.Helper()
	return nil
}

func TestHelperError(t *testing.T) {
	if err := helper(t); err != nil {
		t.Fatal(err)
	}
}
